fix_candidates_evaluated.result: SKIP — below 75% auto-apply threshold. Status: TRACKING in graduated_rules.json.
ALREADY_APPLIED — applied in Run 120. graduated_rules.json status: DISABLED_LIVE_CONTRADICTION.
DEFERRED — code change required (bot/execution/leverage.py). Not JSON-fixable. Consecutive runs: 2.

BLOCKED_BY_DATASET_CONFLICT — 100d backtest shows 80-90% conf = 40.0% WR (weak), but 965-trade full dataset shows 80-90% conf = 60.2% WR (strong). Contradictory evidence. Cannot safely expand CONF_PARADOX rule until conflict resolved.

auto_fix.new_finding_this_run: DATASET_CONFLICT: 100d backtest vs 965-trade dataset give opposite conclusions on confidence bin 80-90%. Blocks all confidence-range rule changes.

execution_forensics.noise_stop_pct: 50.8% of SL hits at conf>75 in noisy regimes
execution_forensics.instant_sl_note: 89% of SL hits are same-candle closes — stop width 0.86% avg vs 1.2%+ needed. HYPE most affected.

duration_h_analysis.finding: CONFIRMED: duration_h=0 for ~89% of trades because stops fire in same simulated candle as open
duration_h_analysis.root_cause: Backtest engine patches pos.open_time=sim_dt but candle-level SL check (update_price) uses same sim_dt for close_time. Same-candle open+close = hold_time_s=0.
duration_h_analysis.fix_needed: Minimum hold of 1 candle-duration (3600s for 1h candles) or use 5m sub-candle timestamps for close_time

output.noise_stop_problem: 89% instant SL — stop width too tight (0.86% avg, needs 1.2%+)

new_finding_this_run.description: 100d backtest (589 trades) vs full dataset (965 trades) give OPPOSITE conclusions on confidence bins 80-90% and 90%+. 100d: 80-90%=40.0% WR -$33/trade. Full: 80-90%=60.2% WR +$7.67/trade. Possible regime shift in last 100 days — high-confidence trades have degraded recently.
new_finding_this_run.implication: Cannot apply CONF_PARADOX expansion to 80-100% until dataset conflict resolved. The 100d window may reflect genuine regime deterioration of model confidence.

daily_synthesis.note: No new data since Run 120. Report already exists for today. Next synthesis update on new trade data or next-day rollover.

swap_recommendation.change: Haiku -> Sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT trigger only

model_optimization.note: Theoretical analysis — bot offline, no live call data. Unchanged from Run 120.

high_priority_findings.detail: Zero live trading. trades.csv missing. All feedback loops stalled. Each additional offline day = ~$800-1,200 estimated foregone paper PnL. 71 days without live execution = $56,800-$85,200 in missed backtest-equivalent returns.

high_priority_findings.finding: NEGATIVE EDGE: Kelly fraction = -0.167 (structural R:R deficit)
high_priority_findings.detail: Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27. Win/loss ratio 0.91 at 44.5% WR = -$1,384 expected loss per 100 trades. No JSON rule fix resolves negative Kelly — requires SL widening in code (bot/execution/leverage.py or bot/trading_config.py). Confidence 82%.
high_priority_findings.action: Code change: widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR minimum. File: bot/trading_config.py (ATR_SL_MULTIPLIER_HYPE)

high_priority_findings.finding: NEW: DATASET_CONFLICT blocks confidence-range rule changes
high_priority_findings.detail: 100d backtest shows conf 80-90% = 40.0% WR (-$33/trade). Full 965-trade dataset shows 80-90% = 60.2% WR (+$7.67/trade). These directly contradict. Cannot safely expand CONF_PARADOX_sizing_v1 or apply any confidence-range intervention until resolved. Likely cause: model confidence quality degraded in last ~100 trading days (regime shift).
high_priority_findings.action: Investigate: split 965-trade dataset into early-vs-recent to confirm temporal regime shift in confidence quality. Then re-evaluate CONF_PARADOX scope.

high_priority_findings.detail: All trades show duration_h=0.0. Root cause confirmed: 89% of SL hits are same-candle closes (sim_dt used for both open and close time). HoldTimeRuleManager cannot enforce 3h minimum hold. Backtest learning from hold-time patterns is neutered.
high_priority_findings.action: Code fix at bot/execution/position_manager.py:1398 — add 1-candle minimum to hold_time_s: hold_time_s = max((pos.close_time - pos.open_time).total_seconds(), candle_duration_s). Also patch pos.opened_at = sim_dt in engine.py:1941 alongside open_time.

high_priority_findings.finding: HYPE SHORT veto inversion unresolved — conf=71% blocks auto-apply
high_priority_findings.detail: HYPE SHORT <75% conf = 60% WR +$15/trade (n=15) / 52.3% WR +$8.91/trade (n=65). HYPE SHORT >=75% conf = 31.2% WR -$70.06/trade (n=77). Blanket 80% block applies equally to profitable and catastrophic sub-conditions. Rule confidence at 71% — 4 points below 75% auto-apply threshold.
high_priority_findings.action: Awaiting live confirmation OR confidence bump to 75%+. No code change this run. Will auto-apply when confidence threshold met.
